title: TRENING INDYWIDUALNY (COACHING) JAKO METODA POMOCNA W ROZWIĄZYWANIU PROBLEMÓW NA FERMACH NISKOPRODUKCYJNYCH
description: A guide presenting individual coaching as a tool to help producers on low-production farms implement and maintain biosecurity standards. The methodology, tested on farms in Brittany and central France, offers practical solutions such as hygiene sluices, zonation, and disinfectant trays to improve on-farm health management.
